typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Feature commit `0cf5417116be732d49896716519067940053f545` only updates scrutiny artifacts and contains no implementation/test code changes for the assigned crossflow fix.
Dashboard and popover rendered-indicator assertions in `SwitcherCrossFlowTests` remain renderability-only (`XCTAssertNotNil`) instead of asserting concrete rendered labels/identifiers.
Cross-surface switch evidence still uses direct store mutation (`setActiveProfile`) under simulated-UI comments rather than UI callback/action paths.
VAL-CROSS-009 launch-chain checks remain store-inference/comment based (`Launch adapter would use ...`) without concrete launch invocation traces from UI-driven action paths.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Codify VAL-CROSS evidence bars: rendered-indicator claims must assert concrete rendered labels/accessibility values, and switch/launch claims must be proven via UI callbacks and launch invocation traces (not store mutation/comments).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 7 failed for the same renderability/store-inference pattern at `SwitcherCrossFlowTests` lines 2430, 2475, 2530, 2596, 2781, 2799, 2846, and 2864.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeat recommendation to enforce context-read evidence and handoff traceability in switcher worker skills
